languages.text: "Отчего же?" {n}Ведо-Ан искренне удивляется и даже склоняя голову на бок.{/n} "Разве наш возлюбленный Император, Защитник Человечества и Покровитель, не восседает сейчас в божественных чертогах на священной Терре, окруженный Святыми? И души наших усопших не прислуживают Бессмертному, греясь в золотых лучах его божественного света?"

traits.locale_text: "Отчего же?" {n}Ведо-Ан искренне удивляется и даже склоняя голову на бок.{/n} "Разве наш возлюбленный Император, Защитник Человечества и Покровитель, не восседает сейчас в божественных чертогах на священной Терре, окруженный Святыми? И души наших усопших не прислуживают Бессмертному, греясь в золотых лучах его божественного света?"
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

languages.text: "But why?" {n}Vedo-An cocks his head in genuine surprise.{/n} "Does our beloved Emperor, Guardian of Humanity and Sovereign, not sit in the divine hall of the Holy Terra among the Saints? Do the souls of our departed not serve the Immortal, basking in the golden rays of His unearthly splendour?"
languages.original_text: "Отчего же?" {n}Ведо-Ан искренне удивляется и даже склоняя голову на бок.{/n} "Разве наш возлюбленный Император, Защитник Человечества и Покровитель, не восседает сейчас в божественных чертогах на священной Терре, окруженный Святыми? И души наших усопших не прислуживают Бессмертному, греясь в золотых лучах его божественного света?"

traits.locale_text: "But why?" {n}Vedo-An cocks his head in genuine surprise.{/n} "Does our beloved Emperor, Mankind's Protector and Sovereign, not sit in the divine hall of the Holy Terra among the Saints? Do the souls of our departed not serve the Immortal, basking in the golden rays of His unearthly splendor?"
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

traits.locale_text: "But why?" {n}Vedo-An cocks his head in genuine surprise.{/n} "Does our beloved Emperor, Mankind's Protector and Sovereign, not sit in the divine hall of the Holy Terra among the Saints? Do the souls of our departed not serve the Immortal, basking in the golden rays of His unearthly splendor?"
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

traits.locale_text: "But why?" {n}Vedo-An cocks his head in genuine surprise.{/n} "Does our beloved Emperor, Guardian of Humanity and Sovereign, not sit in the divine hall of the Holy Terra among the Saints? Do the souls of our departed not serve the Immortal, basking in the golden rays of His unearthly splendour?"
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

languages.text: "Aber warum?" {n}Vedo-An wendet seinen Kopf in echter Überraschung.{/n} "Sitzt unser geliebter Imperator, Hüter der Menschheit und Herrscher, nicht in der göttlichen Halle des Heiligen Terra unter den Heiligen? Dienen die Seelen unserer Verstorbenen nicht dem Unsterblichen und sonnen sich in den goldenen Strahlen seines überirdischen Glanzes?"
languages.original_text: "But why?" {n}Vedo-An cocks his head in genuine surprise.{/n} "Does our beloved Emperor, Guardian of Humanity and Sovereign, not sit in the divine hall of the Holy Terra among the Saints? Do the souls of our departed not serve the Immortal, basking in the golden rays of His unearthly splendour?"

languages.text: "Mais pourquoi ?" {n}Vedo-An penche la tête, sincèrement surpris.{/n} "Notre empereur bien-aimé, gardien de l'humanité et souverain, ne siège-t-il pas dans la salle divine de la Sainte-Terre parmi les saints ? Les âmes de nos défunts ne servent-elles pas l'Immortel, se prélassant dans les rayons dorés de sa splendeur impérissable ?"
languages.original_text: "But why?" {n}Vedo-An cocks his head in genuine surprise.{/n} "Does our beloved Emperor, Guardian of Humanity and Sovereign, not sit in the divine hall of the Holy Terra among the Saints? Do the souls of our departed not serve the Immortal, basking in the golden rays of His unearthly splendour?"

languages.text: "但是为什么呢？"{n}维多安惊讶地扭过头去。{/n}"我们敬爱的皇帝陛下，人类的守护者和君主，难道没有坐在圣地的神圣殿堂里，与圣人为伍吗？难道我们逝去的灵魂没有侍奉不朽者，沐浴在他非凡光辉的金色光芒中吗？"
languages.original_text: "But why?" {n}Vedo-An cocks his head in genuine surprise.{/n} "Does our beloved Emperor, Guardian of Humanity and Sovereign, not sit in the divine hall of the Holy Terra among the Saints? Do the souls of our departed not serve the Immortal, basking in the golden rays of His unearthly splendour?"

languages.text: «Pero, ¿por qué?». {n}Vedo-An ladea la cabeza con auténtica sorpresa.{/n} «¿Acaso nuestro amado Emperador, Guardián de la Humanidad y Soberano, no se sienta en la sala divina de la Santa Tierra entre los Santos? ¿Acaso las almas de nuestros difuntos no sirven al Inmortal, deleitándose en los dorados rayos de Su esplendor sobrenatural?».
languages.original_text: "But why?" {n}Vedo-An cocks his head in genuine surprise.{/n} "Does our beloved Emperor, Guardian of Humanity and Sovereign, not sit in the divine hall of the Holy Terra among the Saints? Do the souls of our departed not serve the Immortal, basking in the golden rays of His unearthly splendour?"

languages.text: 「でも、どうして？{n}ヴェド＝アンは首をかしげて驚いた。{/n}「人類の守護者であり君主であるわが最愛の皇帝は、聖なるテラの神聖な広間で聖人たちに混じって座っていないのだろうか？亡き人の魂は不滅の神に仕え、その神秘的な輝きを浴びていないのだろうか？
languages.original_text: "But why?" {n}Vedo-An cocks his head in genuine surprise.{/n} "Does our beloved Emperor, Guardian of Humanity and Sovereign, not sit in the divine hall of the Holy Terra among the Saints? Do the souls of our departed not serve the Immortal, basking in the golden rays of His unearthly splendour?"

languages.text: "Ama neden?" {n}Vedo-An gerçek bir şaşkınlıkla başını eğdi.{/n} "Sevgili İmparatorumuz, İnsanlığın Koruyucusu ve Hükümdarımız, Kutsal Terra'nın ilahi salonunda Azizlerin arasında oturmuyor mu? Ölenlerimizin ruhları Ölümsüz'e hizmet etmiyor mu, O'nun olağanüstü ihtişamının altın ışınlarının tadını çıkarmıyor mu?"
languages.original_text: "But why?" {n}Vedo-An cocks his head in genuine surprise.{/n} "Does our beloved Emperor, Guardian of Humanity and Sovereign, not sit in the divine hall of the Holy Terra among the Saints? Do the souls of our departed not serve the Immortal, basking in the golden rays of His unearthly splendour?"
